case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. REBEKAH HOLBROOK

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HOLBROOK, REBEKAH SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-22-2018

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLBROOK, REBEKAH $10,419.61 PRINCIPAL, $429.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,849.11, SEE SCANNED DOC
